scripts.check:types: pnpm --filter @agent-core/core build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p test/cloudflare/tsconfig.json
scripts.lint: pnpm --workspace-root exec oxlint --deny-warnings packages/agent-core-cloudflare/src packages/agent-core-cloudflare/test packages/agent-core-cloudflare/scripts
scripts.test: pnpm check:artifacts && pnpm check:ownership && pnpm test:structural && pnpm test:cloudflare
scripts.test:cloudflare: pnpm --filter @agent-core/core build && pnpm check:cloudflare-types && vitest run --config test/cloudflare/vitest.config.ts

requiredChanges: Add @agent-core/cloudflare test, type, build, lint, coverage, generated-type, and packed-consumer commands to aggregate CI.
Classify environment.head, environment.revision, environment.session, environment.snapshot, environment.port-exposure as Environment-Actor records.
Classify slate, slate.version, slate.publication, slate.deployment, slate.resource, slate.preview, slate.deployment-reservation, slate.resource-reservation as Workspace-Actor records.
Preserve strict unknown-codec rejection and do not classify caches, R2 objects, provider handles, or profile declarations as domain records.
Replace W8 source-absence assertions only after the corresponding private conformance fragment is accepted.

releaseConditions: The Cloudflare root export and packed NodeNext positive and negative checks may integrate now.
Environment, Slate, and profile exports remain deferred until authoritative W2/W3/W5/W6/W7 integration closes every applicable profile atom.

requirements: W3 owns the shared profile contract, canonical wire validation, lifecycle, manifest composition, and protected-runtime dependency interfaces.
W8 profile-specific directories consume these contracts but do not define, copy, or export a shared substitute.
W3 and W6 must replace the provisional external admission interface with authoritative mediation before any profile is complete or public.
requests.acceptanceCommand: pnpm --filter @agent-core/core exec vitest run test/environments test/slates test/profiles test/core/context-values.test.ts

requiredChanges: Keep packages/agent-core/src/identity/id.ts WorkspaceId as the sole constructor.
Coordinate with W7 so packages/agent-core/src/workspaces/index.ts re-exports the identity-owned WorkspaceId and packages/agent-core/src/workspaces/id.ts no longer declares one.
acceptanceEvidence: new WorkspaceId("x") imported through identity and workspaces has constructor identity equality.
No second class WorkspaceId declaration exists under packages/agent-core/src.

requirements: W6 must consume W2 authority evidence and atomically recheck current path epochs before each W8 effect.
W8 must not own authority decisions, Grants, Bindings, path watermarks, or admission persistence.
Environment and Self effects require target-scoped exact-Turn verification, not merely a live token.
Environment pins must identify both EnvironmentId and Revision and must not duplicate W8 Environment records.
Replace ExternalProtectedProfileAdmission with an adapter over W6 preparation, claim, attempt, approval, Receipt, commit, and reconciliation ownership.
Return the authoritative Receipt type; remove W8-owned synthetic Receipt outcomes and process-local approval consumption.
Pass the exact effect idempotency identity to W8 handlers only after admission succeeds.
Provide host-authenticated profile Event publication with normative Receipt-to-Event causality.
Provide the authoritative Queue target adapter; W8 remains transport-only and owns no Event, reservation, projection, or delivery record.
After W2 publishes the canonical constructor, re-export identity.WorkspaceId from workspaces and remove the duplicate workspaces/id.ts constructor.
Until that sequence lands, W8 Slate code remains private and no cross-context WorkspaceId compatibility is claimed.
